posts.text:
Soft light, sharp gaze. There's something about golden hour portraits that makes everything feel cinematic.

#AIbeauty #AIart #digitalart #midjourney

image_prompt.prompt: Close-up portrait of a beautiful woman with soft golden hour lighting, warm amber tones, cinematic depth of field, light catching in her eyes, natural skin texture, subtle bokeh background with warm light flares, photorealistic, 8k quality
image_prompt.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, oversaturated, harsh shadows, plastic skin, deformed features
image_prompt.style_reference: Editorial beauty photography, golden hour portraiture

posts.notes: Slot 1 — always posted in both variant A (3 posts) and variant B (4 posts). Portrait is our highest-performing category.

posts.text:
Oversized blazer, minimal makeup, maximum attitude. Less is always more when the fit speaks for itself.

#AIbeauty #AIart #AImodel #stablediffusion

image_prompt.prompt: Full-body fashion editorial shot of a woman wearing an oversized cream blazer over a black minimalist outfit, standing in an empty modern loft with concrete floors and floor-to-ceiling windows, clean natural lighting, editorial fashion photography, sharp details, muted color palette
image_prompt.negative_prompt: cluttered background, neon colors, anime style, distorted proportions, extra limbs
image_prompt.style_reference: Vogue editorial minimalism, Scandinavian clean aesthetic

posts.notes: Slot 2 — always posted in both variants. Fashion slot targeting the 18:00 UTC peak engagement window.

posts.text:
Somewhere between a dream and a painting. When art meets code, the boundaries dissolve.

#AIbeauty #AIart #AIgirl #TuesdayVibes

image_prompt.prompt: Ethereal double exposure portrait of a woman merged with watercolor paint splashes in violet and teal, flowing abstract brushstrokes dissolving into her silhouette, surreal artistic composition, mixed media digital art style, dreamy atmosphere, high detail
image_prompt.negative_prompt: photorealistic, harsh lines, solid backgrounds, low quality, blurry face
image_prompt.style_reference: Mixed media art, watercolor and digital fusion, Agnes Cecile style

posts.notes: Slot 3 — always posted in both variants. Artistic category with trending #TuesdayVibes hashtag for discoverability.

posts.text:
You can only pick one look for the rest of the year — which one are you choosing? Drop your answer below 👇

#AIbeauty #AIart #digitalart

image_prompt.prompt: Split-frame comparison image showing two contrasting beauty looks side by side: left side features a woman with sleek pulled-back hair and bold red lip in cool blue-toned lighting, right side shows the same woman with flowing soft waves and dewy natural makeup in warm golden lighting, clean white divider between both, editorial quality, high detail
image_prompt.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, text overlay, watermarks, anime style
image_prompt.style_reference: Instagram engagement-bait format, side-by-side beauty comparison

posts.notes: Slot 4 — only posted in variant B (4 posts/day). Interactive engagement-bait format inspired by @baharaykin's 'choose one' strategy driving high reply counts.

reply_templates: The lighting in this is unreal — love how it catches the highlights so naturally.
This color palette is everything. The warm tones really pull it all together.
Incredible composition here. The depth of field adds so much to the mood.
Love the styling on this one — the details really make it stand out.
That soft glow effect is gorgeous. What tool did you use for this?
The textures in this are next level. You can almost feel the fabric.
This might be my favorite from your recent work — the expression is so captivating.
Beautiful use of contrast here. The shadow work really elevates the shot.
